title: Bolyra Conformance Test Vector Schema
description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for Bolyra conformance test vectors. Validates the common structure of all vector types without per-type sub-schemas.

version.description: Semantic version of the test vector suite (e.g., '0.4.0')

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this vector

description.description: Human-readable description of what this vector tests

type.description: The category of conformance behavior being tested

status.description: Stability level of this vector; experimental vectors may change without notice

inputs.description: Arbitrary key/value inputs supplied to the construct under test

result.description: Whether this input combination should pass or fail conformance

expected.description: Expected outcome, including result and any additional behavioral checks
